organization_info.description: Law firm representing clients in special education matters.

description: Search Tip: So you don't have to scroll through pages of addresses on your state page, do this: With Windows, press Control, letter F, with Mac press Command, letter F, then type in your city, zip code, or other search criteria, such as esq. for an attorney. Try zip codes for other nearby towns. Those listings containing an asterisk (*) have sponsored a Wrightslaw conference.

name: Behavior Connections
city: Behavior Connections Kim Strandberg Accent on Care 3309 Fiechtner Drive
description: Behavior Connections Kim Strandberg Accent on Care 3309 Fiechtner Drive, Suite C Fargo, ND 58103 (701) 212-0448; (701) 356-2273 Email: behaviorconnections | at | yahoo.com Web: http://www.behaveconnect.com Provides brief behavior consults, workshops, parent skills training, or functional assessments for behavior disordered children with or without Developmental Disabilities, Autism, or ADHD.

name: Freedom Resource Center for Independent Living
city: Freedom Resource Center for Independent Living 2701 9th Avenue SW Fargo
description: Freedom Resource Center for Independent Living 2701 9th Avenue SW Fargo, ND 58103 (800) 450-0459; (701) 478-0459 Email: cindyg | at | freedomrc.org Web: http://www.freedomrc.org We provide information, referral services, assist obtaining adaptive equipment, advocacy (including IEP's), independent living skills, ADA accessibility surveys, call or write for more information.

name: Independence, Inc.
description: Independence, Inc. 300 3rd Ave SW, Suite F Minot, ND 58701 (701) 837-4724 Email: independencecil | at | independencecil.org Web: http://www.IndependenceCIL.org Nonprofit consumer driven organization for individual of any age with a disability. No charge for services they are government funded. Provide information, referral services, assist obtaining adaptive equipment advocate on you behalf (sit in on IEP's), independent living skills, ADA accessibility surveys, call or write for more information.
